deliverables.title: Unspecified Student Product
deliverables.description: A deliverable intended for students, though the exact nature, format, and scope are undefined.

implicit_expectations: The product must be relevant to student needs or pain points.
The product should be accessible and usable by the target student demographic.
The deliverable must be a completed, functional output rather than just a concept.

ambiguities.issue: The phrase 'Make something' provides no specification on the format, medium, or scope of the deliverable.
ambiguities.suggested_clarification: Specify the type of product to be created (e.g., mobile app, web platform, study guide, physical tool).

ambiguities.issue: The target audience 'students' is too broad and lacks demographic specifics.
ambiguities.suggested_clarification: Define the specific student audience (e.g., K-12, university, medical students, engineering students) and their context.

ambiguities.issue: No deadlines, constraints, or success metrics are provided.
ambiguities.suggested_clarification: Establish a project timeline, budget/tech constraints, and clear success criteria.

structured_goals.statement: Define the specific target student demographic and their core needs.
Determine the format and core features of the product to be built.
Develop and deliver the final product for the students.

result.source_notes: Extremely vague brief; no specific sections, speakers, or details to note.
result.escalation_reason: Low confidence in requirement extraction. Manual review or clarification recommended.
